title: Doctor Doctor
subTitle: Keshav and Pushkar, two aspiring doctors, join a medical college and set out on an exciting and crazy journey, full of adventures.

title: Sur Niragas Ho
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs composed and performed by talented artists is played back-to-back to entertain the audience.

title: Timepass 2
subTitle: Dagadu and Praju, who loved each other as kids, meet again after 15 years. However, Dagadu finds that Praju has changed a lot, making him wonder if true love really exists.

title: TDM
subTitle: A young man struggles to make ends meet and works hard to improve his life. During his journey, he meets a girl and falls in love with her.

subTitle: Babanrao, a municipal sweeper, lives a monotonous life and struggles to provide enough money for his family. Things change when he fortuitously finds a load of money.

subTitle: Orphaned at birth and blamed for her mother's death, Laxmi endures life's trials as her father scorns her, believing she's a bad omen.
